column_description: the unique identifier of the alert
the id of the suspicious transaction
the calculated risk score of the alert
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
Risk score ranges from 0 to 100. Higher scores indicate higher risk. Scores above 70 typically require immediate investigation.

column_description: the date when the alert was generated
the current status of the alert
the date when the alert was resolved
value_description:
Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
NULL if not yet resolved

column_description: whether a Suspicious Activity Report was filed
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
1 means SAR was filed with authorities, 0 means no SAR filed
